ideas.title: Aircraft de-icing simulation in ANSYS
ideas.summary: A thermal-fluid project combining airflow, icing conditions and surface heat transfer with a practical engineering use case.

ideas.title: Power engineering dashboard with Pandas and Pandapower
ideas.summary: A reusable analysis tool for grid studies, load cases and visualising power-system behaviour in a cleaner way.

ideas.title: Home automation orchestration layer
ideas.summary: A small system that ties together Google Home, NFC tags and SmartThings-style triggers in one place.

ideas.title: Sensor logger in embedded C
ideas.summary: A low-level build to bridge software, electronics and real-time data collection.

ideas.title: R notebooks for statistical exploration
ideas.summary: A notebook set for comparison plots, cleaner statistical workflows and broader data-analysis tooling.

ideas.title: FMEA / RCA toolkit for energy systems
ideas.summary: A structured way to catalogue failure modes, symptoms, causes and follow-up actions across thermal and process assets.
